---
name: Typo or error
about: Found a typo, factual mistake, or unclear step in one of the day files
title: "[DayXX] short description"
labels: ["correction"]
---

**Which day / topic?**
e.g. Day 04 — Enable S3 Bucket Versioning

**Where is the error?**
e.g. Under "Steps (CLI)", the command in line ...

**What's wrong?**
A clear description of the issue.

**Suggested fix (optional)**
What should it say instead?
